arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold looks annoyed after being benched as Liverpool fans throw party despite losing at Brighton
arts.sum: Despite travelling more than 250 miles to see their side lose, Reds supporters threw a post-match party at the AMEX, but Alexander-Arnold did not appear to be in the mood.

arts.ttl: Harvey Elliott drops transfer hint over Liverpool future following Brighton defeat
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Harvey Elliott drops a hint about his future after scoring in Monday's 3-2 defeat to Brighton & Hove Albion.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's three-word description of Liverpool's defeat to Brighton speaks volumes
arts.sum: Liverpool fell to a 3-2 defeat at Brighton on Monday night, despite the champions twice taking the lead on the south coast as the Seagulls kept up their hopes for European qualification

arts.ttl: Liverpool ratings: Salah gets 5/10 as champs fall to Brighton
arts.sum: Despite getting a guard of honor, Brighton & Hove Albion spoiled Liverpool's party where Mohamed Salah was unable to make an impact.

arts.ttl: Brighton boost European hopes with late win over Liverpool
arts.sum: Jack Hinshelwood scored with five minutes remaining to down the Premier League champions.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs. Liverpool: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: Champions Liverpool visit Brighton in the Premier League on Monday night. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV, score prediction and more.
